title: coreopsis acmella
intro: Coreopsis acmella, also known as bitter buttons, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its bitter compounds that are used to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of Coreopsis acmella include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis acmella include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
